records.m_Talk_ENG: How's it looking over there? Did you find anything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How's it looking over there? Did you find anything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How's it looking over there? Did you find anything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. No signs of Violarite or humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. No signs of Violarite or humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. No signs of Violarite or humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The roofs we are currently walking on are the only evidence that this was once a city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The roofs we are currently walking on are the only evidence that this was once a city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The roofs we are currently walking on are the only evidence that this was once a city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps everything is buried underneath after twenty years of snow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps everything is buried underneath after twenty years of snow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps everything is buried underneath after twenty years of snow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. Then where are we supposed to start digging in this large area?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. Then where are we supposed to start digging in this large area?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. Then where are we supposed to start digging in this large area?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Morgana...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Morgana...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Morgana...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, thick thighs?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, thick thighs?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, thick thighs?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The survey corps from twenty years ago was also aware that the snow in the gelid lands doesn't melt or stop falling, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The survey corps from twenty years ago was also aware that the snow in the gelid lands doesn't melt or stop falling, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The survey corps from twenty years ago was also aware that the snow in the gelid lands doesn't melt or stop falling, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Even the kids at the Stump know that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Even the kids at the Stump know that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Even the kids at the Stump know that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, if they left something in anticipation that we'd come for them one day...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, if they left something in anticipation that we'd come for them one day...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, if they left something in anticipation that we'd come for them one day...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think they would've picked the highest location... where snow wouldn't pile up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think they would've picked the highest location... where snow wouldn't pile up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think they would've picked the highest location... where snow wouldn't pile up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Let's go check it out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Let's go check it out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Let's go check it out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Over here! The spire is the tallest structure here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Over here! The spire is the tallest structure here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Over here! The spire is the tallest structure here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a lighthouse, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a lighthouse, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a lighthouse, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's a lighthouse?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's a lighthouse?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's a lighthouse?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a tower that prevents boats from getting lost in the dark. There is at least one in every city facing the sea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a tower that prevents boats from getting lost in the dark. There is at least one in every city facing the sea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a tower that prevents boats from getting lost in the dark. There is at least one in every city facing the sea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you ever seen one before, Morgana?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you ever seen one before, Morgana?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you ever seen one before, Morgana?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I haven't, but I learned about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I haven't, but I learned about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I haven't, but I learned about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to be knowledgeable in Avalon's history if I want to become a Druid like Merlin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to be knowledgeable in Avalon's history if I want to become a Druid like Merlin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to be knowledgeable in Avalon's history if I want to become a Druid like Merlin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it doesn't seem useful at the time... they all have some use in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it doesn't seem useful at the time... they all have some use in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it doesn't seem useful at the time... they all have some use in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't find the entrance to the lighthouse. It seems to be buried in the snow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't find the entrance to the lighthouse. It seems to be buried in the snow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't find the entrance to the lighthouse. It seems to be buried in the snow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would be best to just check the top, but how do we get up there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would be best to just check the top, but how do we get up there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would be best to just check the top, but how do we get up there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch... I guess climbing the wall won't be easy because it's so slippery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch... I guess climbing the wall won't be easy because it's so slippery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch... I guess climbing the wall won't be easy because it's so slippery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about throwing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about throwing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about throwing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Throw? Like what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Throw? Like what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Throw? Like what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why are you looking at me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why are you looking at me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why are you looking at me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... want to throw me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... want to throw me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... want to throw me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am a Helgon, so strength isn't a problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am a Helgon, so strength isn't a problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am a Helgon, so strength isn't a problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're light, so it's worth a shot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're light, so it's worth a shot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're light, so it's worth a shot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess it's the fastest way to reach the top.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess it's the fastest way to reach the top.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess it's the fastest way to reach the top.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, I'm going to throw you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, I'm going to throw you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, I'm going to throw you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait...! Whoa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait...! Whoa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait...! Whoa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: KYAAAAAAH!
records.m_Talk_DEU: KYAAAAAAH!
records.m_Talk_FRA: KYAAAAAAH!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah hah hah!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah hah hah!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah hah hah!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong? You're scaring me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong? You're scaring me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong? You're scaring me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah... haa...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah... haa...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah... haa...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing?! Why did you suddenly put your hands in my armpits?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing?! Why did you suddenly put your hands in my armpits?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing?! Why did you suddenly put your hands in my armpits?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Well, I have to lift you up first if I'm going to throw you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Well, I have to lift you up first if I'm going to throw you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Well, I have to lift you up first if I'm going to throw you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Never! Again!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Never! Again!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Never! Again!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you dare touch my armpits! You got that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you dare touch my armpits! You got that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you dare touch my armpits! You got that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Morgana is sensitive to other people touching her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Morgana is sensitive to other people touching her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Morgana is sensitive to other people touching her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even when she was young and got stuck in a hole while playing hunting, she almost fainted while Merlin tried to help her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even when she was young and got stuck in a hole while playing hunting, she almost fainted while Merlin tried to help her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even when she was young and got stuck in a hole while playing hunting, she almost fainted while Merlin tried to help her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you don't have to bring up the past all of a sudden.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you don't have to bring up the past all of a sudden.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you don't have to bring up the past all of a sudden.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know Morgana had a weakness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know Morgana had a weakness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know Morgana had a weakness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should keep note of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should keep note of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should keep note of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean you're going to be careful about it from now on, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean you're going to be careful about it from now on, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean you're going to be careful about it from now on, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Place your foot on my palms. I'll throw you like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Place your foot on my palms. I'll throw you like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Place your foot on my palms. I'll throw you like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You sure? But I'm not as light as you, Morgana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You sure? But I'm not as light as you, Morgana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You sure? But I'm not as light as you, Morgana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you worried about? I'm strong enough to even toss a bear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you worried about? I'm strong enough to even toss a bear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you worried about? I'm strong enough to even toss a bear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A b-bear?! I'm not that heavy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A b-bear?! I'm not that heavy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A b-bear?! I'm not that heavy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, up you go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, up you go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, up you go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huah?! Don't people normally count to three before throwing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huah?! Don't people normally count to three before throwing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huah?! Don't people normally count to three before throwing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A hole in one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A hole in one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A hole in one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you see? Is there anything out of the ordinary, like a corpse or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you see? Is there anything out of the ordinary, like a corpse or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you see? Is there anything out of the ordinary, like a corpse or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, no corpses, but... I did find something interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, no corpses, but... I did find something interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, no corpses, but... I did find something interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a copper bottle that's filled with sand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a copper bottle that's filled with sand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a copper bottle that's filled with sand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's probably an incense burner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's probably an incense burner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's probably an incense burner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's used in religious ceremonies to create smoke.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's used in religious ceremonies to create smoke.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's used in religious ceremonies to create smoke.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what about the huge statue with its hands clasped?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what about the huge statue with its hands clasped?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what about the huge statue with its hands clasped?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know. Maybe some god the people here worshipped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know. Maybe some god the people here worshipped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know. Maybe some god the people here worshipped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was taught that the civilizations that came after Avalon's division each had their own faith.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was taught that the civilizations that came after Avalon's division each had their own faith.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was taught that the civilizations that came after Avalon's division each had their own faith.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Other than that, is there anything suspicious that catches your eye?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Other than that, is there anything suspicious that catches your eye?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Other than that, is there anything suspicious that catches your eye?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something suspicious...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something suspicious...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something suspicious...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are a few writings on the wall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are a few writings on the wall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are a few writings on the wall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think... it's written in blood?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think... it's written in blood?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think... it's written in blood?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Writings in blood? What does it say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Writings in blood? What does it say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Writings in blood? What does it say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>The devil will come... when the bell rings.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>The devil will come... when the bell rings.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>The devil will come... when the bell rings.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's that sound...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's that sound...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's that sound...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Miss Morgana!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Miss Morgana!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Miss Morgana!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is someone on the ridge!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is someone on the ridge!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is someone on the ridge!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is that...? A scarecrow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is that...? A scarecrow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is that...? A scarecrow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since when has it been looking at us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since when has it been looking at us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since when has it been looking at us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Morgana! There are more of them on the other side too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Morgana! There are more of them on the other side too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Morgana! There are more of them on the other side too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it's more than just a couple of them! They're growing in numbers!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it's more than just a couple of them! They're growing in numbers!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it's more than just a couple of them! They're growing in numbers!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, they've surrounded us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, they've surrounded us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, they've surrounded us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But they haven't surrounded us completely! I'll distract them, so run to the other side!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But they haven't surrounded us completely! I'll distract them, so run to the other side!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But they haven't surrounded us completely! I'll distract them, so run to the other side!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Then what about me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Then what about me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Then what about me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time! Hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time! Hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time! Hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, run down the ridge! We must lose them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, run down the ridge! We must lose them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, run down the ridge! We must lose them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How's it looking over there? Did you find anything?

root.m_Talk_FRA: How's it looking over there? Did you find anything?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, I'm going to throw you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, I'm going to throw you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait...! Whoa!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait...! Whoa!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait...! Whoa!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: KYAAAAAAH!
root.m_Talk_DEU: KYAAAAAAH!
root.m_Talk_FRA: KYAAAAAAH!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah hah hah!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah hah hah!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah hah hah!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong? You're scaring me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong? You're scaring me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong? You're scaring me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah... haa...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah... haa...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah... haa...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whew...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whew...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whew...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing?! Why did you suddenly put your hands in my armpits?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing?! Why did you suddenly put your hands in my armpits?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing?! Why did you suddenly put your hands in my armpits?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Well, I have to lift you up first if I'm going to throw you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Well, I have to lift you up first if I'm going to throw you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Well, I have to lift you up first if I'm going to throw you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Never! Again!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Never! Again!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Never! Again!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you dare touch my armpits! You got that?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you dare touch my armpits! You got that?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you dare touch my armpits! You got that?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Morgana is sensitive to other people touching her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Morgana is sensitive to other people touching her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Morgana is sensitive to other people touching her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even when she was young and got stuck in a hole while playing hunting, she almost fainted while Merlin tried to help her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even when she was young and got stuck in a hole while playing hunting, she almost fainted while Merlin tried to help her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even when she was young and got stuck in a hole while playing hunting, she almost fainted while Merlin tried to help her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you don't have to bring up the past all of a sudden.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you don't have to bring up the past all of a sudden.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you don't have to bring up the past all of a sudden.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know Morgana had a weakness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know Morgana had a weakness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know Morgana had a weakness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I should keep note of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I should keep note of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I should keep note of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You mean you're going to be careful about it from now on, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You mean you're going to be careful about it from now on, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You mean you're going to be careful about it from now on, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Place your foot on my palms. I'll throw you like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Place your foot on my palms. I'll throw you like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Place your foot on my palms. I'll throw you like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You sure? But I'm not as light as you, Morgana.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You sure? But I'm not as light as you, Morgana.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You sure? But I'm not as light as you, Morgana.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you worried about? I'm strong enough to even toss a bear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you worried about? I'm strong enough to even toss a bear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you worried about? I'm strong enough to even toss a bear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A b-bear?! I'm not that heavy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A b-bear?! I'm not that heavy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A b-bear?! I'm not that heavy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, up you go!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, up you go!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, up you go!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huah?! Don't people normally count to three before throwing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huah?! Don't people normally count to three before throwing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huah?! Don't people normally count to three before throwing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A hole in one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A hole in one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A hole in one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you see? Is there anything out of the ordinary, like a corpse or something?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you see? Is there anything out of the ordinary, like a corpse or something?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you see? Is there anything out of the ordinary, like a corpse or something?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, no corpses, but... I did find something interesting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, no corpses, but... I did find something interesting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, no corpses, but... I did find something interesting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a copper bottle that's filled with sand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a copper bottle that's filled with sand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a copper bottle that's filled with sand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's probably an incense burner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's probably an incense burner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's probably an incense burner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's used in religious ceremonies to create smoke.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's used in religious ceremonies to create smoke.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's used in religious ceremonies to create smoke.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what about the huge statue with its hands clasped?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what about the huge statue with its hands clasped?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what about the huge statue with its hands clasped?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know. Maybe some god the people here worshipped.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know. Maybe some god the people here worshipped.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know. Maybe some god the people here worshipped.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was taught that the civilizations that came after Avalon's division each had their own faith.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was taught that the civilizations that came after Avalon's division each had their own faith.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was taught that the civilizations that came after Avalon's division each had their own faith.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Other than that, is there anything suspicious that catches your eye?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Other than that, is there anything suspicious that catches your eye?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Other than that, is there anything suspicious that catches your eye?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something suspicious...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something suspicious...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something suspicious...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are a few writings on the wall.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are a few writings on the wall.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are a few writings on the wall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think... it's written in blood?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think... it's written in blood?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think... it's written in blood?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Writings in blood? What does it say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Writings in blood? What does it say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Writings in blood? What does it say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>The devil will come... when the bell rings.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>The devil will come... when the bell rings.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>The devil will come... when the bell rings.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's that sound...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's that sound...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's that sound...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: M-Miss Morgana!
root.m_Talk_DEU: M-Miss Morgana!
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-Miss Morgana!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is someone on the ridge!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is someone on the ridge!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is someone on the ridge!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is that...? A scarecrow?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is that...? A scarecrow?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is that...? A scarecrow?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since when has it been looking at us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since when has it been looking at us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since when has it been looking at us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Morgana! There are more of them on the other side too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Morgana! There are more of them on the other side too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Morgana! There are more of them on the other side too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it's more than just a couple of them! They're growing in numbers!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it's more than just a couple of them! They're growing in numbers!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it's more than just a couple of them! They're growing in numbers!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, they've surrounded us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, they've surrounded us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, they've surrounded us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But they haven't surrounded us completely! I'll distract them, so run to the other side!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But they haven't surrounded us completely! I'll distract them, so run to the other side!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But they haven't surrounded us completely! I'll distract them, so run to the other side!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Then what about me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Then what about me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Then what about me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time! Hurry!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time! Hurry!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time! Hurry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, run down the ridge! We must lose them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, run down the ridge! We must lose them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, run down the ridge! We must lose them!
